chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6429 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.28703/2024 2. For order on office objection No.22 & 23 3. For orders on Misc. No.28704/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.28705/2025 5. For hearing of main case 13.02.2025 Mr. Abdul Shakoor, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions 2,4&5. The petitioner impugns a Notification issued in the year 2017, however, the petition has been filed in 2024. There is prima facie bar of laches. Furthermore, the petitioner stated to be an Association and it is contended that its members are aggrieved by the impugned notification. Be that as it may, the Association itself could not befall in the category of an aggrieved person per Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petition found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
